title: Opening for Software Engineer at Ninjacart Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Ninjacart Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ninjacart Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Ninjacart Digital Technologies:
Ninjacart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart Digital Technologies!
